content_body: What a wonderful home you have. We loved the kitchen and cooked some great meals. We ventured out too! We went whitewater rafting on the Ocoee River, visited Mountain Valley Farmers Market, Blackberry Mountain (waterfalls + hiking), 3 Sister's Vineyard, Helton Creek Falls, and Gold Nugget Mining. We loved our stay! Coming from Florida, it was a refreshing change.
title: What A Wonderful Home!
